_format.note: Voice-style placeholder prose for the dossier and battle log. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike, [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent (sparing, on charged words), !!text!! for blood-red text (rare, on the words the document writes anyway). All prose is lowercase.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick.
_format.templates: {actor} = lowercased name of the doer. {target} = lowercased name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name (lowercased). {status} = lowercased affliction name.

subtitles.fire: something is wrong with its heat.
subtitles.water: it is dry to the touch. it should not be.
subtitles.grass: it has been waiting longer than i have.
subtitles.light: it does not warm what it lights.
subtitles.Emberkin: i have been carrying it. i did not know.
subtitles.Cinderling: no fuel observed. the heat continues.
subtitles.Pyrelord: it has been here longer than anyone i have asked.
subtitles.Magmaw: when it opens i hear another room.
subtitles.Charnel: i look away when i can.
subtitles.Rivergeist: it does not stay where i set it down.
subtitles.Brineback: it has been here too long.
subtitles.Mireling: i found it where i had left no print.
subtitles.Loamback: i mistook it for a stone. then for ~~moss~~ a face.
subtitles.Sproutkin: it is small. it is opening.
subtitles.Mosshorn: it was a stone for a long time.
subtitles.Vinewyrm: it is crossing the room. slowly.
subtitles.Bloomback: it is in flower. the flowers face me.
subtitles.Lumenpup: it does not cast a shadow.
subtitles.Dawnstag: it knows when the dawn was.
subtitles.Halowyrm: the light it carries hurts. i look anyway.
subtitles.Glimmerfox: i never saw it begin to move.
subtitles.Voidling: there is a place where it should be.
subtitles.Umbragale: the wind in this room is wrong.

fire: it ~~burns~~ smolders where i did not light it.
i feel its heat after it has gone.
it does not warm me. it warms what i was.
water: i hear ~~water~~ something running near it.
grass: where i did not plant, it grows.
it is older than the ground it stands on.
light: it is too ~~bright~~ clear to look at directly.
the light it makes is not clean.
i can still see it when i ~~close~~ shut my eyes.
dark: it has been here longer than i thought.
it does not require my eyes to see me.
Emberkin: the lining of my coat has been soaked through for some time. i could not say since when.
it ~~hums~~ does not hum. the floor next to it does.
the **handwriting** in the file's margin matches the new lines in my own.
Ashmaw: feeding log: the small things first. the smaller ones first within those.
it watches the page while i write. !!the smaller words!! first. then the longer ones. then my hand.
it is **patient** with me. for now.
Cinderling: specimen lit at !!field site!!. brought through containment door. designation: small.
no fuel ~~observed~~ permitted. the spark ~~continues~~ continues.
specimen does not require ~~feeding~~ attention. specimen ~~has not~~ has not.
Pyrelord: this room has always been its room. the assignment paperwork lists me as the most recent !!visitor!!.
i asked someone older. they remembered being told about it as a child.
no one interrupts it. no one has.
Magmaw: it opens once a day. then less. then at the same time as ~~yesterday~~ tomorrow.
what is inside it is not it. what is inside it is ~~bigger~~ farther.
the air smells of [[8]]. last month it smelled of [[12]]. !!the smell is getting closer!!.
Soothlick: it cleans the wounds. then the smaller things inside them. then the things i did not know were there. then.
after, the hour is missing. so are the !!parts of me it cleaned!!.
Charnel: the floor under it does not blacken. that work is already done.
do not write what it ~~eats~~ takes. !!do not write it!!. do not.
Tidewhelp: follows streams that are not in this building.
my throat has been fine for !!several days!!. my throat has been fine.
Rivergeist: the file lists three handlers before me. each marked it differently.
rate of travel: never the same. direction: ~~consistent~~ repeatable.
the showers in the next wing run upward now. !!at night!!. always at night.
Brineback: white floor under it. white ceiling above it.
the brine does not leave. neither does the room. neither does the hour.
i was the second handler assigned to it. i have not asked about the !!first!!.
Mireling: found it under what i had not lifted. i have stopped lifting things.
the mud where it sleeps does not dry.
i do not know what it is small for. someone else might.
Coralhusk: phase two: the remainder has edges. they ~~are~~ remember.
the hand i used the once has [[5]]. !!file separately!!. !!do not return it!!.
Frostfin: do not remember catching it. do not remember catching it.
colder where it sits. colder where it has sat.
i think it has been the same one. all of them. !!every time!!.
Deepmaw: looking at it, i look at something further down.
the report says i measured it. i do not remember measuring it.
it has been **waiting**. i have begun to ~~wait~~ keep watch with it.
Loamback: the ground misses it when it leaves. i miss it when it leaves.
set down, the floor under it darkens. !!it looks back up!!.
Sproutkin: it has been opening for ~~weeks~~ the duration of my assignment.
the file does not say what is inside.
i should ~~stop~~ keep watching. the !!instructions!! are ~~clear~~ unsigned.
Mosshorn: the place it sat is colder than the rest of the floor.
shifts at night. once a night. always at the same hour.
no one has measured how long it was a stone for.
Vinewyrm: while it moves, the page ~~tightens~~ holds.
i was at the door yesterday. at the wall today. !!i did not move!!.
it knows where my chair is.
Bloomback: they do not turn with the light. they turn with my chair.
i ~~picked~~ took one. the rest noticed. they have not stopped.
the smell is **sweet**. !!that is the worst part!!.
Thornling: it does not mean to. i think.
i can feel where it touched, three days later. four. !!still!!.
Hollowoak: i can hear something inside it. there is nothing inside it. both lines are written into the file in the same hand.
it has been here longer than the others. its file is older than the building's.
it does not move. that is its **work**.
Lumenpup: makes shadows on me. does not cast its own.
it is warm. it should be warmer. !!i should be warmer!!.
i cannot picture it when i ~~close my eyes~~ try to.
Aurabeast: the room is brighter where it has stood. so is the page.
does not eat. has been here [[10]]. does not need to.
i think it has been **writing me down**. i ~~stopped~~ have stopped finding sentences i recognize.
Dawnstag: arrived at first light on a thursday. there has not been another thursday.
antlers different each time i look.
does not sleep. does not need to. does not !!remember!! why it might.
Halowyrm: it is longer than the room. i have ~~measured~~ counted. counting has been going wrong.
when it speaks i do not ~~hear~~ remember it. i write things i do not understand.
Glimmerfox: faster than i am. faster than the previous handler.
i am not certain it was ever here. the file is.
i write its name and i think of !!her!!.
Shadowmaw: stays low to the floor. has stayed there as long as the floor has been there.
waiting for me to ~~speak~~ say it. !!no!!. i ~~have~~ have not.
Voidling: i can see what is behind it. it is not behind it.
does not occupy a volume. the volume is occupied around it.
Nightcreep: i did not see it move. !!nothing did!!.
i should ~~not~~ keep writing this down.
Wraithfin: ~~is~~ has been here a moment longer than i have looked. is here when i look back.
i can see through it. behind it: the hallway, the door, ~~someone i recognize~~ no one.
it does not breathe. ~~i~~ neither do i, lately.
Umbragale: i can hear another room when it is near. !!i think i know which one!!.
the page lifts when ~~i~~ it has not.

passives.brutal: it does not measure how hard.
passives.thick_hide: it arrives heavier than it left.
passives.tide_guard: the water answers when it asks.
passives.iron_grip: once it has hold of a thing.
passives.tide_blessed: the salt does not leave it.
passives.verdant_soul: green does not heal it. it heals green.
passives.sunforged: hammered out of a brighter place.
passives.shadowforged: hammered out of where light is not.
passives.tempo: keeps a meter i cannot follow.
passives.lightbearer: walks ahead of its own glow.
passives.soul_drain: takes a small piece each strike.
passives.vampire_touch: every hit is a small drink.
passives.second_wind: stands once after it has fallen.
passives.warm_blood: resists the cold that comes after.
passives.iron_will: does not bend where others would.
passives.hex_eater: swallows what is laid upon it.
passives.frostbite: cold spreads from where it touches.
passives.patient_hunter: waits longer than it needs to.
passives.echo_form: repeats the last sound i made.
passives.dreadful: i do not want to look at it.
passives.lucky: the dice do not catch it.
passives.savage: does not stop at the kill.

events.swap_in: {actor} steps forward to take its place.
events.swap_none: {actor} ~~tries~~ has no one to swap to.
events.swap_curse: the name takes from {actor} on the way out.
